name: Morphous Robin
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible approachable dashboard system derived from a robin breast: vivid orange primary actions, warm brown wing structure, cream feather surfaces, dark ink details, and hedge-green status accents for friendly task, activity, and insight dashboards.
typography: Approachable English dashboard UI with clear metric numerals, warm section titles, compact labels, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese task, activity, status, and analytics screens.
layout: Dense but calm 8px dashboard grids, warm cream surfaces, wing-brown side navigation, orange action states, hedge-green success chips, structured tables, search command surfaces, feather texture, clipped hedge accents, and restrained 8px cards.
